---
title: "Projects"
listing:
  contents: projects
  type: default
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  feed: false
page-layout: full
---

I work on open-source tools at the intersection of protein structure and machine learning for genomics. Each project is documented end-to-end, with code, examples, and a write-up of the design choices.

If you find any of these useful — or want to collaborate — [send me an email](about.qmd#get-in-touch).
